title: B's VoidTotem
description: A Minecraft plugin for 1.20.5+, that saves players from the void if they hold a Totem of Undying.
body:
# B's VoidTotem
##  **The plugin does:**
When a player falls into the void, if they have a totem in one of their hands, the totem will pop. The player will be launched up by a fast levitation effect, and than fall down safely, with slowfall, while particles and sound effects play.
## **Setup:**
No setup needed, the plugin, once loaded, will automaticly effect all players.
## **Proper use:**
This plugin only works on JDK 21 PaperMC servers, this means the plugin doesen't work on the versions under 1.20.5.

### **Join my discord to report issues or just to talk and have fun:** [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/XwFqu7uahX)
